description.appConsent: This cookie is required to store the consent for cookie usage.
description.demoConsent: This cookie is required to store the demo consent for cookie usage.
description.themeConsent: Stores the theme with which the application should be displayed.
description.tableConsent: Stores the settings for column widths of a table in the application.
description.hintConsent: Stores whether the application tour should be shown again on the next application launch.
